Indian Transformation Academy offers courses on Mental health which can change your life for the better.
Learn more

The ITA - Offers you life transforming courses all at the click of a button

Indian Transformation Academy is a premier institute for mental health and wellness, run by professionals in the industry. They offer a wide array of courses that are designed to give you life changing skills in the field. Their courses are primarily targeted at teachers, coaches, consultants, working professionals, business owners and students. Now you can easily resolve mental health concerns such as Depression, Anxiety, Overthinking, Fears & Phobia's etc.

WHAT PEOPLE SAY ABOUT ITA

I was suffering a high level of anxiety, including panic attacks, when I came to him and I am happy to say that I am calmer and more relaxed and managing life issues much better now. I would highly recommend Aman to others. Aman is a great listener with compassion and wisdom and was able to help me overcome my mental health challenges in just a few weeks.

Nitin Sharma
GM - Marketing

Aman was phenomenal in recognizing my mental health challenges and worked on my issues accordingly. His personalized approach towards my issues worked like pure magic. It's been one and half months since I have started taking sessions with him and I see substantial change in myself already. I feel much less of anxiety and panic attacks, I sleep lot better than before, I can focus at work and feel I can handle everyday challenges a lot better.

Arpita
Team Manager

"Aman is an excellent trainer and an Amazing coach. He has immense knowledge of Mental health practices and is able to identify someone's mental illness with little effort and is also able to help the person recover in an easy manner. The Employees who attended his workshop were really satisfied and I would like to thank Aman for conducting this Mental health workshop for us. "

Rahil Sultan
VP - Edfinitely
